Miscarriages occur around 15-20% pregnancies, usually during first three months (first trimester).
Having miscarriages indication future infertility.
However, when woman experiences consecutive miscarriages, underlying cause must considered.
Miscarriage divided into groups: early miscarriage late miscarriage.
Recurrent early miscarriages Also called RPL, these occur during first trimester.
Recurrent early miscarriage usually caused from chromosomal genetic problems embryo, around 60-80% spontaneous aborted fetus have abnormal chromosome numbers.
Another cause miscarriage structural problems with uterus.
Recurrent late miscarriage This result uterine abnormalities, incompetent cervix, premature labor, autoimmune problems.
Blood tests diabetes, insulin resistance, autoimmune diseases, diseases related pituitary thyroid glands.
Ultrasound anatomical testing.
Chromosome testing products conception after multiple losses (DNA analysis).
Blood clotting studies, especially people with family history venous thrombo-embolism.
Selecting chromosomally normal embryo increase your chances live birth.
This done through Colorado vitro fertilization (IVF) where woman's eggs man's sperm combined laboratory.
Resulting embryos tested chromosomal problems that cause miscarriage.
Around repeated miscarriages related uterine structural problems.
These abnormalities (anomalies) uterus often congenital (somet hing born with), such double uterus, septate uterus (divided wall), other malformation.
Some uterine abnormalities form during woman's life, such polyps fibroids.
These growths occur anywhere uterus, affect pregnancy.
addition, scarring uterus lead miscarriages.
These problems treated with surgery, which increases your chances healthy pregnancy.
Endocrine problems warrant investigation include diseases pituitary thyroid glands, polycystic ovarian syndrome, diabetes mellitus.
Luteal phase defect (LPD) suggests problems with hormones, which result miscarriage.
Treatment ovulation induction stimulation medications, such clomiphene citrate (Clomid).
addition, progesterone therapy popular helping maintain uterus lining (endometrium).
Immunological problems develop when mother produces antibodies that cause blood vessel clotting, which harms developing fetus.
fetus does receive nutrients, utero, which leads miscarriage.
Several blood tests used detect this problem, easily treated with aspirin heparin.
